persona_pain: Inbox busywork and slow follow-up make you miss the inbound window and look bad to your AE
persona_blurb: Your job is meetings. You live in the gap between marketing handing over a lead and sales getting a discovery call on the calendar. Every delay in follow-up, every manual step, every no-show not chased — that's a meeting you didn't book. These plays close that gap: fast inbound response, warm-signal conversion, and lead recovery without the grind.

recipes.name: Auto-connect on meeting or signup
recipes.outcome: Same-day LinkedIn draft ready for one-click approval, so the BDR beats the inbound window without autonomous sending.
recipes.needs: HubSpot or FirstTouch-accessible inbound list/import required

recipes.name: Social engager flow — leadership posts
recipes.outcome: Convert engagement on CEO/exec/leadership posts into booked meetings before interest fades.
recipes.needs: No HubSpot required; HubSpot optional for qualification/routing

recipes.name: Website visitor play
recipes.outcome: Turn pricing/demo/product-page visits into LinkedIn touches while intent is active; if no visitor signal source exists, fall back to the BDR AI SDR recipe instead of running both on the same contacts.
recipes.needs: HubSpot tracking or RB2B/list source required; otherwise route to BDR AI SDR

recipes.name: BDR AI SDR — daily approval queue
recipes.outcome: View a HubSpot contact/company list or discover a new ICP list, enrich each prospect, and draft up to 10/day free or 20/day Sales Nav/Premium meeting-generation touches for approval.
recipes.needs: No HubSpot required with ICP brief + FirstTouch Discover Contacts; HubSpot list optional

recipes.name: Social campaigns — narrow ICP meeting push
recipes.outcome: Build a one-time LinkedIn campaign for a narrow BDR segment such as connected leadership titles, last-year no-shows, or ICP buyers in a tradeshow city, using approved static templates and flow-level approval.
recipes.needs: No HubSpot required for Discover Contacts or connection/list sources; HubSpot required for no-show or CRM-history segments

recipes.name: Scoop-up slipped leads — no-shows and old MQLs
recipes.outcome: Reach back on no-shows and leads that never converted to opportunities.
